evidence.flagged_cutover: Projection reads are gated by FEATURE_PHASE04_PROJECTION_READS; the existing search-doc path remains the default rollback path.
evidence.grouped_contract: Projection reads group by unit_id and unit_identity_epoch, return representative inventory cards, and store ordered_unit_keys plus legacy ordered_listing_ids.
evidence.version_isolation: Query hash and v4 cursor contracts include projection_epoch, embedding_version, ranker_profile_version, unit_identity_epoch_floor, and snapshot_version.
evidence.snapshot_behavior: Legacy cursor contract mismatches return snapshot_expired, Phase 04 hydration filters missing/tombstoned units, backfills holes, and records snapshot_hole_ratio.
evidence.semantic_isolation: Semantic candidate reads filter by getReadEmbeddingVersion() and publish_status='PUBLISHED'; disable_semantic_search falls back to filter-only projection reads.

deferred: Broader search sweep still has unrelated api/search/facets raw where-clause guard failures and one unbounded-browse fixture mismatch.
search-v2-service.test.ts exhausts heap even with --max-old-space-size=8192; this matches prior broad-suite heap/OOM risk and is not treated as a Phase 04 blocker.
